establishing.description: ワイドショット・全体環境
establishing.dramaUse: シーン冒頭のみ（1 話に 1 回まで）
establishing.promptHint: wide establishing shot, full environment visible

medium_two_shot.description: 2 人ウエスト以上・向き合い
medium_two_shot.promptHint: medium two shot, both characters waist-up, facing each other

medium_single.description: 1 人ウエスト以上・やや外れ
medium_single.promptHint: medium single shot, one character slightly off-center

ots_left.promptHint: over-the-shoulder shot from left character's back

ots_right.promptHint: over-the-shoulder shot from right character's back

close_face.promptHint: close-up portrait, face fills 70% of frame

extreme_close_eyes.promptHint: extreme close-up, eyes and brow only, fills frame

extreme_close_prop.description: 小道具クローズアップ
extreme_close_prop.dramaUse: 発覚・証拠フォーカス
extreme_close_prop.promptHint: extreme close-up of object, fills frame, sharp focus

low_angle_power.promptHint: low angle shot looking up at character, powerful stance

high_angle_weak.promptHint: high angle shot looking down at character, small and vulnerable

dutch_angle.dramaUse: 裏切り・衝撃・不安定
dutch_angle.promptHint: dutch angle 20 degrees, tilted frame, psychological tension

pov_subjective.promptHint: point of view shot, subjective camera as character's eyes

insert_environment.description: 環境ディテール（雨・時計・扉）
insert_environment.dramaUse: 感情の転換・時間経過
insert_environment.promptHint: insert shot, environmental detail, no characters

back_walkaway.promptHint: rear view, character walking away from camera

silhouette.promptHint: silhouette against strong backlight, dark figure
